description: Add an internal technician note to the service request titled 'Email account not working - cannot send or receive emails' in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus. The note content must be: 'Investigated the issue. Found that the mail server configuration was changed during last week update. Reverting settings now.' Ensure the note is not visible to the requester. Log in with username: administrator and password: administrator.

metadata.request_subject: Email account not working - cannot send or receive emails
metadata.note_text: Investigated the issue. Found that the mail server configuration was changed during last week update. Reverting settings now.
